creator: thejackofclubs01@yahoo.com
text:
when installing usermin a dependancy fails to install because of the missing port. webmin installs fine but when i try to add on usermin it cant install mailbox.

Fix: 

add the correct port for mailbox and tell me when you got it. ;)
How-To-Repeat: triton# whereis usermin
usermin: /usr/ports/sysutils/usermin
triton# cd /usr/ports/sysutils/usermin
triton# make install clean
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> mailbox-1.220-2.wbm.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://www.webmin.com/uupdates/.
fetch: http://www.webmin.com/uupdates/mailbox-1.220-2.wbm.gz: Moved Temporarily
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/.
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/mailbox-1.220-2.wbm.gz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/usermin.
triton#
